# Characters, Mascots, and Portraits

Use this for a person, creature, robot, skull, or game-style mascot.

```text
stylized comic portrait of [CHARACTER], shoulders-up, facing slightly left,
large expressive face, bold silhouette, thick ink outline, simplified hair and
clothing, limited color palette, high contrast, flat shading, clean dark
background, readable facial features at small size, retro BBS ANSI scene art,
no text, no watermark, no signature
```

Avoid realistic skin texture, fine hair, small jewelry, and detailed scenery. If the character needs a prop, use one large prop with a clear outline.

Use the `portrait-cartoon.ini` profile as a starting point.
